claim_boundary: This profile covers only the current SkillGuard Global Router skill files and local router-control records. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, external services, installed prompt freshness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.

evidence.summary: Global router skill entrypoint with required SkillGuard sections.

purpose: Maintain the global SkillGuard registry, router prompt projection, and AGENTS managed block workflow.
residual_risk: Actual installed prompt freshness depends on the latest refresh-global-router and check-global-prompt command output.
